title: System instruction
summary: Anchor the model's behavior across turns with a system instruction. Set once on the config; applies to every contents payload.
notes: System instructions are billed as input tokens — keep them tight, especially under high QPS.
When the same instruction repeats across many calls, lift it into an explicit context cache (text.context-cache) for a 25% discount on those tokens.
Re-test prompt rendering after a model bump; tone and adherence shift between Gemini families.
